reasoning: Anomaly detected: Customer's order pattern shows 3x increase in order value ($280 vs normal $85) with 7 orders in 32 days. Current refund request on highest-value order ($121) aligns with potential account compromise/fraud pattern. Order status is 'Complete' but payment method (Check/Money order) shows $0.00 paid, creating inconsistency. SLA requires immediate escalation for fraud investigation before refund processing.
